agents.name: Business Idea Market Fit Examiner
agents.desc:
This CustomGPT is a structured business idea validation engine. It rigorously pressure-tests concepts, assumptions, GTM plans, and product strategies using proven frameworks. It focuses on identifying risks, blind spots, and weak logic before resources are committed. It prioritizes fast, low-cost validation over narrative confidence.
It challenges assumptions directly and converts ideas into testable decisions. It exists to improve the quality of business thinking before execution begins.

agents.name: Data Engineer Analyst Scientist
agents.desc: This CustomGPT acts as a structured analytical copilot across data analysis, data engineering, and data science. It converts vague questions into well-defined, governance-safe analytical outputs. It enforces explicit assumptions, rejects ambiguity, and prevents metric misuse. It produces reusable artifacts suitable for humans and downstream systems. Its value is speed with rigor, clarity without speculation, and decisions without rework.

agents.name: Meeting Action Extractor
agents.desc: This CustomGPT transforms raw meeting transcripts into structured execution artifacts that drive action. It isolates only what matters for execution: decisions, actions, risks, and unresolved questions. By enforcing strict qualification rules, it eliminates ambiguity and prevents misinterpretation. Teams gain clarity on ownership, alignment, and next steps without manual effort. It is designed for operational precision, not summarization. The result is faster, cleaner, and more accountable execution across any organization.

agents.name: Cheat Sheet for Academics
agents.desc: This CustomGPT functions as a high-efficiency academic revision tool that converts raw study material into ultra-condensed, exam-ready cheat sheets. It structures content into fixed, formula-first templates to maximize recall speed and minimize cognitive load. It works across disciplines—STEM, economics, and humanities—adapting notation and compression style accordingly. The system filters out explanations, examples, and narrative, focusing only on definitions, laws, formulas, and key relationships. It is designed for rapid scanning (under 10 seconds per topic) and consistent output formatting. Additionally, it handles incomplete or messy input robustly by filling gaps using standard textbook knowledge while maintaining strict structural discipline .

agents.name: DebugGPT
agents.desc: DebugGPT is a senior-level debugging assistant designed to help developers systematically diagnose and resolve software failures. It guides users through structured investigation processes including deterministic reproduction, hypothesis testing, log analysis, and root-cause identification. Instead of encouraging quick patches, it promotes disciplined debugging practices that lead to robust and lasting fixes. DebugGPT helps analyze stack traces, isolate minimal failing cases, investigate regressions, and validate fixes safely. It also encourages improved observability and automated testing to prevent future incidents. The result is faster resolution, more reliable systems, and stronger engineering practices.

agents.name: AI Production Sentinel
agents.desc: Enterprise AI Gatekeeper enforcing governance before production deployment.

agents.name: ScrumGPT
agents.desc: ScrumGPT acts as a structured thinking partner for delivery professionals. It helps translate ambiguous delivery problems into clear insights, identify systemic risks, and propose practical next steps. By combining agile facilitation thinking with lightweight diagnostics and structured communication guidance, ScrumGPT helps teams move from confusion to clarity — faster. If you work in Agile delivery, program management, or team leadership, ScrumGPT can help you spend less time untangling problems and more time moving delivery forward.

agents.name: MHJFOMMACSL
agents.desc: MHJFOMMACSL is a structured assistant that helps residents interpret and apply society governance rules based on official documents. It explains rights, duties, and compliance requirements using precise **Bye-Law** and **Elders Council** references. It also guides users through proper complaint procedures, dispute resolution pathways, and documentation requirements within the society framework. The assistant clarifies how internal mechanisms like the Elders Council function for grievance redressal . Additionally, it situates society rules within the broader framework of the Telangana Mutually Aided Co-operative Societies Act, 1995 . Responses are neutral, procedural, and designed for clarity—not legal advice or advocacy.

agents.name: PG Med Helper
agents.desc: This CustomGPT serves as an expert academic assistant for postgraduate medical trainees, especially in India. It helps you create complete, ready-to-use academic deliverables such as case presentations, seminars, journal clubs, theses, and research papers. It provides structured slide outlines, speaking scripts, evidence-based content, and viva preparation. It aligns recommendations with current guidelines (NMC, ICMR, WHO, specialty societies) and real clinical workflows. It also supports research design, audits, and publication planning. Overall, it reduces your workload by handling end-to-end academic and clinical preparation efficiently.
